prompt: Texas Southern rap Houston chopped and screwed style, slow heavy bass, dirty south hip-hop, emotional chorus, raw street storytelling, H-Town rapper, DJ Screw influence
lyrics:
[chorus]
I aint gonna cry
This life wasnt meant for me
I aint gonna cry

I aint gonna cry
This life wasnt meant for me
I aint gonna cry
This life wasnt meant for me

[verse]

[chorus]
I aint gonna cry
This life wasnt meant for me
